# CWE-639: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-639-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type Invoice struct {
	ID     int     `db:"id"`
	UserID int     `db:"user_id"`
	Amount float64 `db:"amount"`
}

// Safe: user-controlled key is scoped to the authenticated owner.
func GetInvoice(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	invoiceID := c.Param("invoice_id")
	ownerID, _ := c.Get("user_id")
	var inv Invoice
	err := db.Get(&inv, "SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM invoices WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2", invoiceID, ownerID)
	if err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, inv)
}
